mapper.insert:
SELECT QUIZ_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO QUIZ ( QUIZ_ID, COURSE_ID, CHAPTER_ID, QUESTION_TYPE, QUESTION_TEXT, ANSWER_TEXT, EXPLANATION, DIFFICULTY, STATUS, AI_GENERATED_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{quizId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{questionType}, #{questionText}, #{answerText}, #{explanation}, #{difficulty}, #{status}, #{aiGeneratedYn}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

SELECT QUIZ_OPTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO QUIZ_OPTION ( OPTION_ID, QUIZ_ID, OPTION_NO, OPTION_TEXT, CORRECT_YN ) VALUES ( #{optionId}, #{quizId}, #{optionNo}, #{optionText}, #{correctYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT QUIZ_ID AS quizId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, EXPLANATION AS explanation, DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, STATUS AS status, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM QUIZ WHERE QUIZ_ID = #{quizId}

SELECT QUIZ_ID AS quizId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, EXPLANATION AS explanation, DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, STATUS AS status, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM QUIZ WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} ORDER BY QUIZ_ID

SELECT QUIZ_ID AS quizId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, EXPLANATION AS explanation, DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, STATUS AS status, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM QUIZ WHERE COURSE_ID = #{courseId} ORDER BY QUIZ_ID

SELECT quizId, courseId, chapterId, courseTitle, chapterTitle, questionType, questionText, answerText, explanation, difficulty, status, aiGeneratedYn, quizBuildStatus, createdAt, updatedAt, sortAt FROM ( SELECT Q.QUIZ_ID AS quizId, Q.COURSE_ID AS courseId, Q.CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, C.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, CC.CHAPTER_TITLE AS chapterTitle, Q.QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(Q.QUESTION_TEXT, 4000, 1) AS questionText, Q.ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(Q.EXPLANATION, 4000, 1) AS explanation, Q.DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, Q.STATUS AS status, Q.AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CC.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS AS quizBuildStatus, Q.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, Q.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, Q.CREATED_AT AS sortAt FROM QUIZ Q JOIN COURSE C ON Q.COURSE_ID = C.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_CHAPTER CC ON Q.CHAPTER_ID = CC.CHAPTER_ID WHERE Q.AI_GENERATED_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS quizId, CC.COURSE_ID AS courseId, CC.CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, C.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, CC.CHAPTER_TITLE AS chapterTitle, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS questionType, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS questionText, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS answerText, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS explanation, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS difficulty, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS status, CC.AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CC.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS AS quizBuildStatus, CC.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, CC.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, CC.UPDATED_AT AS sortAt FROM COURSE_CHAPTER CC JOIN COURSE C ON CC.COURSE_ID = C.COURSE_ID WHERE C.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' AND CC.USE_YN = 'Y' AND CC.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM QUIZ Q WHERE Q.CHAPTER_ID = CC.CHAPTER_ID AND Q.AI_GENERATED_YN = 'Y' ) ) ORDER BY sortAt DESC NULLS LAST, courseId DESC, chapterId DESC, quizId DESC NULLS LAST
SELECT OPTION_ID AS optionId, QUIZ_ID AS quizId, OPTION_NO AS optionNo, OPTION_TEXT AS optionText, CORRECT_YN AS correctYn FROM QUIZ_OPTION WHERE QUIZ_ID = #{quizId} ORDER BY OPTION_NO
